com.blackrook.gloop.opengl.OGLGraphics.Info

Packages that use OGLGraphics.Info
Package
Description
com.blackrook.gloop.opengl
Contains root classes.
com.blackrook.gloop.opengl.gl1
Contains OpenGL 1.X implementations.
com.blackrook.gloop.opengl.gl2
Contains OpenGL 2.X implementations.
com.blackrook.gloop.opengl.gl3
Contains OpenGL 3.X implementations.
com.blackrook.gloop.opengl.gl4
 

  • Uses of OGLGraphics.Info in com.blackrook.gloop.opengl

    Methods in com.blackrook.gloop.opengl that return OGLGraphics.Info
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected abstract OGLGraphics.Info
    OGLGraphics.createInfo()
    Called once in order to fetch context info.
    OGLGraphics.Info
    OGLGraphics.getInfo()
    Gets an info object that returns a lot of OpenGL limits and such for this context implementation.
